parameters.query:
SELECT * FROM jobs
WHERE status = 'queued'
ORDER BY created_at ASC
LIMIT 1
FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED;
UPDATE jobs SET status = 'processing', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}' RETURNING *;

UPDATE jobs
SET status = 'generated',
    rendered_video_url = '{{ $json.rendered_video_url }}',
    render_id = '{{ $json.render_id }}',
    prompt_hash = '{{ $json.prompt_hash }}',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}';

INSERT INTO job_logs (job_id, level, message, detail)
SELECT '{{ $json.id }}'::uuid, 'info', 'verify_mode: output_hash',
  json_build_object(
    'output_hash', '{{ $json.output_hash || "" }}',
    'length_gate_status', '{{ $json.length_gate_status || "no_gate" }}',
    'total_duration', {{ $json.total_duration || 0 }},
    'target_duration', {{ $json.target_duration || 0 }},
    'prompt_lock_action', '{{ $json.prompt_lock_action || "none" }}',
    'length_gate_log', '{{ $json.length_gate_log || "" }}',
    'clip_count', {{ $json.clip_count || 1 }},
    'tts_duration', {{ $json.tts_duration || 0 }},
    'scene_duration', {{ $json.scene_duration || 0 }},
    'total_duration_source', '{{ $json.total_duration_source || "tts" }}',
    'sfx_count', {{ ($json.sfx_timings || []).length || 0 }}
  )::jsonb
WHERE '{{ $json.verify_mode }}' = 'true';

INSERT INTO job_logs (job_id, level, message, detail)
SELECT '{{ $json.id }}'::uuid, 'info', 'prompt_lock: regenerated',
  json_build_object(
    'old_hash', '{{ $json.prompt_hash_current || "" }}',
    'new_hash', '{{ $json.prompt_hash || "" }}'
  )::jsonb
WHERE '{{ $json.prompt_lock_action }}' = 'regenerated';

SELECT * FROM jobs WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}';
UPDATE jobs SET status = 'uploading', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}' RETURNING *;

UPDATE jobs
SET status = 'uploaded',
    youtube_video_id = '{{ $json.youtube_video_id }}',
    youtube_url = '{{ $json.youtube_url }}',
    completed_at = NOW(),
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}'
RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO job_logs (job_id, level, message, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',
  'info',
  'YouTube 업로드 완료',
  NOW()
);

UPDATE jobs
SET retry_count = retry_count + 1,
    status = CASE
      WHEN retry_count + 1 >= 3 THEN 'failed'
      ELSE 'queued'
    END,
    last_error = '{{ $json.error_message }}',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.job_id }}'
RETURNING id, status, retry_count;

INSERT INTO job_logs (job_id, level, message, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.job_id }}',
  'error',
  '{{ $json.error_message }}',
  NOW()
);
SELECT prompt_hash FROM jobs WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}'

settings.errorWorkflow: {{ AO Worker 에러 핸들러 워크플로우 ID }}
